creator: freebsd-bugs@micallef.io
text:
0.103 LTS is not EOL and is presently used in production systems.

Please revert this port from 1.0 LTS to 0.103 LTS. And please create a new port for the latest feature release that is LTS (e.g. security/clamav-lts-latest).

Alternatively, please duplicate the previous commit (version 0.103.8,1) and create a new port (e.g. security/clamav-lts-previous).

This will provide production systems an opportunity to migrate to the next feature release LTS version.
